query:
SELECT 
  dataOrigin,
  CASE WHEN deletedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 'eliminado' ELSE 'activo' END AS estado_borrado,
  isArchived,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  GROUP_CONCAT(SUBSTRING(name, 1, 30) ORDER BY id SEPARATOR ' | ') AS nombres_muestra
FROM projects
GROUP BY dataOrigin, estado_borrado, isArchived
ORDER BY dataOrigin, estado_borrado;
